return O(L)end,function(h)local J,y=199473+-199472,h[720058-720057]while y do S[y],J=S[y]-(297043-297042),(43648-43647)+J if S[y]==-375092+375092 then S[y],v[y]=nil,nil end y=h[J]end end,function(h,J)local O=s(J)local V=function(...)return y(h,{...},J,O)end return V end,function(h,J)local O=s(J)local V=function(V,X,e,Q,L)return y(h,{V,X,e;Q,L},J,O)end return V
